body_transformation: The plump, rounded body maintains its quadruped silhouette but adopts a lean, wiry frame with taut muscle definition. Smooth pink skin transforms into a matte electric blue with vibrant yellow circuit-like patterns glowing faintly across its limbs and torso. Jagged lightning-bolt spines extend along the spine, sharp and angular, replacing the soft curvature of the original. The curled spiral tail tip now features sparking fur tips and a neon green glow at its base, while the large round eyes retain their shape but now shimmer with electric blue highlights.
signature_feature: Tail tip: sparking fur with neon green circuit patterns and electric blue glow.
